steps.title: Match song as singular past
steps.content: The subject is singular: "the song." The time frame is also past, since the sentence describes the song's chart position as of May 15, 1976.

steps.title: Use the agreeing verb
steps.content: A conflicts with the past context, C uses the plural verb "were," and D uses present tense. "Was ranked" agrees with the singular subject and fits the past-tense chart context. The answer is B.
